'''RC-1080''',<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> also referred to as '''Ten-Eighty''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was part of [[Unidentified clone commando team (Asturias)|the team]] sent to [[Aviles Prime]] to catch [[Lorca Oviedo]], a powerful corporate leader who conspired with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The entire team was decimated, save for RC-1080 and [[Zag]]. Ten-Eighty died from injuries sustained on the mission soon after lifting off from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Honor" />
